Max Larner

Work

Featured Projects

78
PythonGeoPandasArcGIS ProMCDA

Dissertation

Developed a Python-based spatial prioritisation framework to identify optimal red squirrel strongholds under pine marten recolonisation in Cumbria, combining MCDA with landscape ecology.

Read more →
83
PythonGeoPandasPyProjR-tree

Shortest Border

Custom algorithm using spatial indexing and geodesic geometry to identify the world's shortest international land border with high computational efficiency.

Read more →
82
PythonGeoPandasRasterioNumPy

Redistribution

Implementation of Jonny Huck's (2015) weighted redistribution algorithm to resolve spatial ambiguity in passively geocoded Twitter data across Greater Manchester.

Read more →

About

Geography graduate,
spatial thinker.

I'm a 1st-class Geography BSc graduate from the University of Manchester, looking for opportunities in GIS-informed consultation or technical roles. My interests span planning, landscape ecology and biodiversity net gain (BNG), and sustainable development.
